V

VacuumCleaner - Class in cz.cvut.fel.omo.model.devices
This class represents vacuum cleaner.
VacuumCleaner(String, Consumption, DeviceState, String) - Constructor for class cz.cvut.fel.omo.model.devices.VacuumCleaner
Creates new Vacuum Cleaner with given name ,consumption and state.
